libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are needed. Tests should run in-process with the resolved Sisu/Guice APIs; if adapting existing coverage, avoid obsolete 2.4.0-era API calls such as the three-argument QualifiedTypeBinder.hear invocation.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8718 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.2; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The POM declares optional SLF4J, OSGi, JUnit, and TestNG integrations; do not add these unless tests intentionally target those optional integrations.
The current compile failure appears to be an API drift in the test code, not missing deterministic setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed. org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.2 is an in-process legacy wrapper around Eclipse Sisu/Guice; its required CDI, sisu-guice no_aop, and org.eclipse.sisu.inject dependencies resolve transitively, and normal usage is classpath scanning/dependency injection without Docker services or environment/system properties.
